channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: De Saracroche aux VPN, comment les Français reprennent le contrôle de leur téléphone
item.description: La meilleure protection contre les arnaques téléphoniques ? Ne plus répondre. C'est le choix qu'ont fait deux Français sur trois. Pourtant, il existe des solutions qui permettent de filtrer le spam, et NordVPN vient d'annoncer une fonctionnalité qui va dans ce sens.

item.title: Replit snags $9B valuation 6 months after hitting $3B
item.description: Replit raised a new $400 million round and said it hopes to have $1B in ARR by year's end.

item.title: Premiers détails sur le projet Helix, la future Xbox qui ne sortira pas avant plusieurs années
item.description: Microsoft fait monter la sauce autour de la future Xbox, désormais connue sous le nom de code « projet Helix ». Le constructeur/éditeur a donné quelques détails supplémentaires et annoncé qu'une version alpha du kit de développement sortira l'année prochaine.

item.title: Grammarly says it will stop using AI to clone experts without permission
item.description: Superhuman says it has disabled Grammarly's "expert review" AI feature that said its edit suggestions were "inspired by" real writers, including our editor-in-chief and other Verge staff members. "After careful consideration, we have decided to disable Expert Review as we reimagine the feature to make it more useful for users, while giving experts real control […]...

item.title: Iran Warns US Tech Firms Could Become Targets as War Expands
item.description: Companies including Google, Microsoft, and Palantir were listed as targets by Iranian media as the conflict with Israel and the US spills into digital infrastructure.

item.title: La Nuki Smart Lock Go transforme votre smartphone en clé pour moins de 160 € pendant les ventes flash d’Amazon (et un Keypad est fourni avec)
item.description: Installation facile, intégration domotique poussée, multiples modes d'ouverture... La Nuki Smart Lock Go a beau être une serrure connectée plus abordable que ses concurrentes, elle reste un modèle tout à fait complet. Pendant les ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon, vous la trouverez, avec son Keypad, à 159 euros au lieu de 209 euros.

item.title: TikTok will let you stream full songs in its app if you're an Apple Music subscriber
item.description: TikTok will soon let you stream full songs in its app via a new integration with Apple Music. The company's new Play Full Song feature makes it possible to link your Apple Music account toTikTok, and play any song that strikes your fancy directly in the app while you're scrolling.Starting a song is as simple as tapping a button in the Sound Details page or your For You page. Assuming you pay for Apple Music, TikTok will then open up a streamlined version of Apple's music player, which you can use to listen to the song, save it for later or add it to a playlist.TikTok says that Play Full Song i...

item.title: Pro-Iran hacktivist group says it is behind attack on medical tech giant Stryker
item.description: The hacktivist group claimed the attack was in retaliation for a U.S. strike on a Tehran school that killed more than 175 people, most of them children.

item.title: I tried Australia's favorite VPN for 24 hours — and it's only a few improvements away from being a superb free VPN
item.description: It shot to second on the iOS App Store in the wake of age verification, but is it any good?

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, March 12 (game #1508)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, March 12 (game #1005)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, March 12 (game #739)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Our Favorite Backyard Bluetooth Speaker Is $25 Off
item.description: The compact but surprisingly potent Ultimate Ears Boom 4 gets marked down ahead of your first spring party.

item.title: Following UFO Expert Disappearance, New Mexico Residents Asked to Hand Over Home Security Footage
item.description: Did he get beamed up?

item.title: I called the Anycubic Kobra S1 the best 3D printer deal this week—until the Elegoo Centauri Carbon 2 Combo crashed in price at Amazon
item.description: A big price-cut in the US and UK make this multi-color enclosed CoreXY 3D printer the one to beat right now.

item.title: Hackers hijack WordPress sites to spread malware using fake CAPTCHA
item.description: A ClickFix attack can come in all shapes and sizes, including through compromised WordPress websites.

item.title: We can't stop raving about Apple's new MacBook Neo — and Amazon just surprised us with its first-ever price cut
item.description: The MacBook Neo is officially available to order today, and Amazon has a first-time discount, bringing the already affordable price down to just £569.97

item.title: Outdated Targeting Data Blamed for Strike on Iranian School as Pentagon Fights for Autonomous Weapons
item.description: At least 175 people were killed in the U.S. strike.

item.title: Microsoft's full screen 'Xbox Mode' will roll out to Windows 11 PCs in April
item.description: Microsoft first debuted its full screen Xbox experience for Windows in the ROG Ally Xbox handheld, in a bid to compete with Steam's nearly 15-year-old Big Picture Mode. That Xbox interface eventually made its way to other Windows 11 gaming portables last year. Today at GDC, Microsoft revealed that its big screen Xbox UI is headed to all Windows 11 devices (including laptops and desktops) in April. Oh yah, and it's now simply called "Xbox Mode."Xbox Mode will only be available in select markets at first, and Microsoft describes it as bringing "a controller-optimized experience to your Windows 1...

item.title: Nespresso machines are going cheap in Amazon's spring sale, and these are my 5 top recommendations
item.description: If you've been thinking about picking up a Nespresso machine but have been worried about the cost, this is your sign.

item.title: 'We can’t wait for players to experience this level of detail in The Witcher 4' — how CD Projekt Red and Nvidia are teaming up to transform the future of PC gaming
item.description: Nvidia is bringing RTX Mega Geometry foliage to Witcher 4 – here’s why it’s more than just a cool name.

item.title: Breakout Ventures raises $114M fund to back AI science startups
item.description: Breakout Ventures is finding growing success by backing early-stage startups in scientific fields such as biology and chemistry.

item.title: Microsoft will start providing game studios with Project Helix consoles in 2027
item.description: Microsoft plans to begin shipping early units of its next generation console, codenamed Project Helix, to game studios starting sometime next year. “We're sending alpha versions of Project Helix to developers starting in 2027,“ said Jason Ronald, vice-president of next generation for Xbox, according to IGN, which was present at the company’s GDC 2026 presentation where it shared early details about the new device. Ronald did not clarify what he meant by “alpha version,” but given the keynote’s developer focus, presumably he meant devkits, which studios could use to start creating games for...

item.title: Microsoft’s ‘Xbox mode’ is coming to every Windows 11 PC
item.description: Microsoft seems more determined than ever to combine Xbox and Windows - to the point that its next-gen Xbox, codenamed Project Helix, will play PC games too. Today, we learned Helix will go alpha in 2027. But the company isn't waiting for Helix before it points Windows gamers in the Xbox direction. Starting in April, […]

item.title: Yes, ‘Chainsaw Man’ Is Really Ending
item.description: io9 has confirmed with Viz Media that the smash-hit manga will come to an end, after speculation surrounding its latest chapter.

item.title: The MacBook Neo Is Putting PC Makers Into Panic Mode
item.description: PC makers either have to respond fast or just sit there and let Apple eat their lunch.

item.title: Nvidia Will Spend $26 Billion to Build Open-Weight AI Models, Filings Show
item.description: The move could position the AI infrastructure powerhouse to quickly compete with OpenAI, Anthropic, and DeepSeek.

item.title: Almost 40 new unicorns have been minted so far this year — here they are
item.description: Almost 40 new unicorns have been minted so far this year — here they are

item.title: VC mega-funds are back with General Catalyst, Spark rumored to be raising billions
item.description: General Catalyst is said to be raising $10 billion and Spark Capital $3 billion. This after several other firms have also raised mega-funds.

item.title: ‘20 years ago, this industry was fighting for survival’ — Spotify claims it’s saved music, but its new report is only one side of the album
item.description: Spotify has revealed its 2025 revenue and payouts, but lesser-known artists are still struggling to make a living.

item.title: Poppi founder on TikTok, Super Bowl ads, and her return to Shark Tank
item.description: For years, venture capitalists have been skeptical of beverage startups, citing thin margins and brutal distribution as reasons most brands never break out. But a new wave of “functional soda” companies has been challenging that assumption, including Poppi, the prebiotic soda brand that grew from a kitchen experiment into a $1.95 billion acquisition by PepsiCo. On this episode of […]...

item.title: Tembo might just be the world's cutest drum machine
item.description: A new company called Musical Beings has officially unveiled the Tembo, which might be the cutest drum machine ever made. Just look at this thing! It's got a wooden chassis that resembles a standard drum machine, but with one key difference. The sequencer is tactile. Users arrange beats by placing magnetic pucks that trigger samples. This seems like a really good way to introduce the basics of sequencing and beatmaking to kids and young adults, being that DAWs and grooveboxes can feature a steep learning curve. The sequencer isn't all that different from what's found on a typical groovebox, but...

item.title: Scientists Just Used Some of Earth’s Worst Chemicals to Produce Battery-Grade Lithium
item.description: A new method transforms a "persistent environmental liability" into a much-desired resource, the researchers say.

item.title: This 'fascinating' Microsoft Excel security flaw teams up spreadsheets and Copilot Agent to steal data
item.description: There's more than one way to skin an Excel table, and this one abuses Copilot.

item.title: Microsoft’s next Xbox, Project Helix, won’t reach alpha until 2027
item.description: We're here at the 2026 Game Developers Conference, where Microsoft "VP of Next Generation" Jason Ronald is talking about a topic near and dear to many gamers' hearts: the future of Xbox. Ronald says the next Xbox, codenamed Project Helix, will have a custom AMD chip with "an order of magnitude increase in raytracing performance" […]

item.title: 29 cut-price household essentials to add to your Amazon Spring Sale cart — from batteries to coffee pods
item.description: Tech bargains are all well and good, but how about 16 electric toothbrush heads for half price?

item.title: This Ryzen 7 9850X3D bundle with a motherboard and 32GB DDR5 saves you $434.99, but I found a better deal for creators and power users with double the RAM
item.description: I've found two great AMD CPU, motherboard, and DDR5 RAM combos, with big savings on both.

item.title: How to watch Sunny Nights on TVNZ+ (it's *FREE*)
item.description: Here's our guide on how to watch Sunny Nights online for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Clauses abusives : l’UFC Que Choisir gagne sa bataille contre Apple, mais…
item.description: La cour d'appel de Paris a confirmé qu'il y avait bien des clauses abusives ou illicites dans les conditions d'utilisation d'Apple Music. Mais elle a modifié certains éléments du jugement initial. Pour l'association de défense des consommateurs qui s'est félicitée de cette décision, « les acteurs majeurs du numérique ne sont pas au-dessus des règles »....

item.title: Meta will let kids under 13 use WhatsApp with parent-managed accounts
item.description: Meta has announced that it’s introducing parent-managed accounts on WhatsApp. Designed to allow young people under the age of 13 to use the messaging platform more safely, these accounts feature new controls that enable a parent or guardian to restrict who can send them messages. Parent-managed accounts can also only be used for messaging and calling, so additional features like Channels, location sharing and Meta AI integration aren’t included. To set up an account, you’ll need to put your phone next to the pre-teen’s device to link the two accounts. Once that’s done, the person managing the ...

item.title: UPerfect UFree V wireless portable monitor review: Great specification, low price, but a few caveats
item.description: This wireless portable monitor is an affordable and flexible second monitor designed for those who travel.

item.title: ‘People feel betrayed’: Joe Rogan calls out Trump hypocrisy as MAGA sees shift over Iran war
item.description: The right-wing podcast host is among a growing list of conservative media moguls turning on the president they once supported. Though President Donald Trump’s vice grip on right-wing culture helped push him to the presidency not once but twice, his war in Iran may have pushed away some of the most powerful voices in the so-called MAGA media, including podcaster Joe Rogan....

item.title: Kate Winslet Is Joining ‘The Hunt for Gollum’
item.description: Winslet will join returning stars Ian McKellen, Andy Serkis, and Elijah Wood in the new 'Lord of the Rings' film.

item.title: Sony sued over high PlayStation Store monopoly prices and download fees
item.description: A lawsuit in the UK alleges that Sony is taking advantage of consumers with its PlayStation Store "monopoly."

item.title: This bizarre indie game challenges you to ‘rizz’ monster girls in a fantasy dungeon
item.description: The bizarre indie game Rizz Dungeon: Skeleton Key to My Heart just got a free demo.

item.title: Les PC portables bureautiques et gamers sont vendus au rabais durant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon
item.description: Les Ventes Flash d’Amazon 2026 sont l’occasion idéale pour renouveler son ordinateur portable sans exploser son budget. Gaming, bureautique, ultrabooks ou machines 2-en-1 : de nombreux modèles profitent actuellement de remises intéressantes, découvrez ici les meilleures offres.

item.title: Une console Ayaneo a un bug qui ressemble à de l’espionnage
item.description: Ayaneo, célèbre constructeur de consoles rétro, est au cœur d'une carabistouille pas nette. Une de ses applications enverrait à un serveur suspect des centaines de captures d'écran réalisées sans prévenir l'utilisateur. L'entreprise se défend d'espionner ses clients, en invoquant un simple bug… et même si les circonstances peuvent inquiéter, il semble que ce soit l'hypothèse la plus probable....

item.title: John Carpenter's Toxic Commando is World War Z meets MudRunner and has already become my go-to co-op shooter
item.description: John Carpenter's Toxic Commando delivers excellent shooting and seamless co-op play.

item.title: How to watch PSG vs Chelsea: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for Champions League Round of 16 1st leg
item.description: All the ways to watch PSG vs Chelsea live streams from anywhere and for free, as the defending champions seek revenge for their Club World Cup final defeat.

item.title: How to watch Real Madrid vs Man City: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for Champions League Round of 16 1st leg
item.description: All the ways to watch Real Madrid vs Man City live streams from anywhere and for free, as the Bernabéu hosts the pick of the Champions League Round of 16 ties.

item.title: My first-ever Pokémon adventure is still fantastic on the Switch 2, but I wish the LeafGreen asnd FireRed rerelease had something to make it a little more special
item.description: Pokémon LeafGreen and its sibling Pokémon FireRed are as excellent today as when they were released in 2004.
